caption:
😏 The clock struck 11 PM, and the silence of the library was my only companion, but my eyes were fixed on the one who kept waiting outside my office door. I adjusted my oversized blazer, the silk blouse beneath clinging to my curves, knowing the scent of jasmine and danger followed me like a shadow.

He was a brilliant student, eager, and yes, a bit bold. I let him in, the lock clicking shut behind us, and the air in the room grew thick.

He dropped his books, his gaze traveling slowly up my pencil skirt, lingering on the way my hips moved when I stood. 'Professor,' he whispered, voice trembling. 'I have a question.'

I smiled, leaning closer, the heat of my breath against his ear. 'Questions require... patience.'

I watched his pupils dilate, my heart racing as I reached for the file he'd left on my desk, letting the hem of my skirt ride slightly as I bent to retrieve it. The friction of the fabric, the scent of ink and old paper, the electric charge building between us. It wasn't just a lecture anymore. It was a private tutorial. 😈

#UniversityLife #ProfessorVibes #LateNight #CurvesAndBooks #SecretDesires #TeacherAdventures
